_comment: Adjusts the PolicyEngine-US baseline for North Carolina to reflect the rate-reduction triggers currently in statute that PolicyEngine-US does not yet encode. Under current law, the individual income tax rate is scheduled to drop from 3.99% to 3.49% in 2027 and 2.99% in 2028 based on the consensus forecast. This file is applied to the baseline simulation; the Stein reform layer (reform.json) then overrides these rates and adds the additional provisions.
